about.title: About Me
about.subtitle: My journey
about.bio: Software Engineer at Netcompany with experience architecting enterprise web applications, leading cross-functional teams, and integrating Agentic AI workflows. I specialize in Java, Spring Boot, React, and TypeScript, and I'm passionate about open-source contributions to frameworks like Hono and Elysia.

netcompany.title: Software Engineer
netcompany.description: Contributed from scratch to Amplio Life & Pension (ALP), an industrial-level European case-handling web application. Designed core SDK integrations for S3-compatible object storage, Kafka, and internal mailbox. Built a high-performance Outlook Calendar integration with Hazelcast caching. Spearheaded Agentic AI workflow integrations, reducing bug-fixing turnaround by 40%. Mentored 6-7 developers and led cross-functional code review groups.

nodesign.title: Full Stack Engineer
nodesign.description: Freelance full-stack development, delivering end-to-end web applications for clients remotely.

smatyx.title: Junior Frontend Developer
smatyx.description: Implemented a scalable, multi-tenant web UI using React and TypeScript. Built reusable component patterns with Ant Design, increasing development efficiency by 25%.

saigontv.title: Freelance Full Stack Engineer
saigontv.description: Developed an SEO-friendly online news platform and CMS using React and Bun, backed by a containerized Docker setup.

fpt_software.title: Intern Frontend Developer
fpt_software.description: Implemented a client-side career hub application using React at FPT Software Academy.

mindx.title: Mentor
mindx.description: Taught teenagers and kids programming fundamentals via Scratch, data structures, and related concepts at MindX Technology School.

education.title: Bachelor's in Information Technology
education.description: Graduated from International University - National University, HCMC. Participated in IU Hackathon and served as a Computer Vision researcher focusing on AIoT technologies.
